summary: Replay proof now directly shows completed replay reuse before provider or bootstrap dependency failures can matter.

targeted_proof.command: npm run test:summary:server:unit -- --file server/src/test/mcp2/tools/codebaseQuestion.happy.test.ts --test-name "completed replay survives a completed-cache clear"
targeted_proof.notes: Focused unit replay proof passed with tests run: 1, passed: 1, failed: 0 after replaying the second call under intentionally broken Copilot readiness and chat dependencies.

targeted_proof.command: npm run test:summary:server:unit -- --file server/src/test/integration/mcp-codebase-question-ws-stream.test.ts --test-name "completed replay survives a completed-cache clear"
targeted_proof.notes: Focused websocket replay proof passed with tests run: 1, passed: 1, failed: 0 after replaying the second MCP call under intentionally broken websocket chat and provider dependencies, then restoring healthy deps for the fresh-path assertion.
